arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Chelsea LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
Maresca threatens Sancho: Chelsea boss with clear message ahead of debut
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has told Jadon Sancho that he must 'work properly' to see regular minutes at Chelsea ahead of his potential debut. Sancho is in line to make his Chelsea debut against Bournemouth this weekend and Enzo Maresca has revealed what he told the player ahead of signing him.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling's new Arsenal role, Chelsea transfer truth and huge net worth after Man City success
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling was the story of transfer deadline day late last month after leaving Chelsea on loan and could now debut for Arsenal against Tottenham Hotspur in the North London Derby . It would be the player's 25th career appearance versus Spurs, only playing more often - 26 times - against Manchester United .

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Chelsea TV channel, live stream details and kick off time
arts.sum: Next up for the Blues is a trip to the Vitality Stadium to face Bournemouth, who are one of the remaining six unbeaten teams left in the Premier League this season. The last time Bournemouth and Chelsea played each other was the final game of the 2023/24 season, when the Blues ran out 2-1 winners to secure a sixth place finish.

arts.ttl: Jorginho's comments about Frank Lampard and Thomas Tuchel speak volumes after Chelsea exit
arts.sum: Despite Lampard's relatively short and unsuccessful time as Chelsea manager, Jorginho, who has since joined Arsenal, has revealed that he enjoyed working under the Englishman. Arsenal midfielder Jorginho admits he was starstruck by Chelsea legend Frank Lampard when he took over as the Blues' manager.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson's TV career, gambling and alcohol awareness, Chelsea love and Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Following a boozy night with fellow England legends, Merson confronted former Liverpool player Razor Ruddock about his drinking in an interaction that was caught on film. Merson has thanked the TV series Harry's Heroes, which sees H arry Redknapp oversee a group of former stars, for their help and credited them for "saving his life."

arts.ttl: Paul Merson thinks Chelsea would actually sell ‘outstanding’ player for £100m
arts.sum: Paul Merson believes that Chelsea would be willing to sell their star player if they receive a gigantic nine-figure transfer bid for him. Chelsea were...

arts.ttl: Tyler Dibling's Chelsea transfer truth after Southampton display vs Man United
arts.sum: Former Chelsea winger Tyler Dibling has had a better start to life back in Southampton than he did at Stamford Bridge. The 18-year-old was handed his first Premier League start for Southampton in their 3-0 defeat to Manchester United on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals moment he knew Arsenal must sign Raheem Sterling
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta says he knew after just 10 seconds that Raheem Sterling was the right signing for Arsenal to make on transfer deadline day. The first call I had with him I knew in the first ten seconds we have to bring him because he really wanted it.

arts.ttl: Chelsea have key contract decision to make before January
arts.sum: His new deal keeps him committed to the Stamford Bridge club until the summer of 2025, six months after his loan deal with IF Brommapojkarna is due to expire. Chelsea confirmed that Bergstrom signed a new contract with the club before completing the switch.
